comment: Key players per squad. q = quality 1-10. st = fit|doubtful|injured|suspended. yel = tournament yellow cards (2 -> 1-match ban, wiped after QF). ban = remaining matches banned. stats accumulate during the tournament (min=minutes, g=goals, a=assists, pass=pass completion %, drib=dribble success %); null pass/drib = no data yet. Form is computed vs positional baselines and updates team strength dynamically.
league_comment: Club-league strength multiplier on player quality: q_eff = q x (1 + (coef-1) x league weight). Update 'lg' when players transfer.
inj_comment: inj = injury proneness 0 (iron) .. 3 (fragile); expected-absence Elo discount + raised for age>32. age as of June 2026.
exp_comment: wc = prior World Cups played (capped at 3 in model). mental = big-match temperament -2..+2, ONLY set where strongly documented (shootout records, documented finals performance); default 0 - 'clutch/choker' narratives are mostly noise. Star-dependence penalty replaces naive 'star gets marked' (already priced into Elo).
